title: MapReduce - lib/map
description: The lib/map directory contains classes that are used to implement the MapReduce framework. The MultithreadedMapper class is a thread-safe implementation of the Mapper interface that can improve throughput when the Map operation is not CPU-bound. The WrappedMapper class wraps a given Mapper to allow custom Mapper.Context implementations. These classes collaborate to handle the mapping phase of the MapReduce process, which involves processing input data and generating intermediate key-value pairs. The architectural role of the lib/map directory is to provide reusable and modular components for implementing the Map function in a scalable and efficient manner.
